introduction.en: Senior Mobile Engineer with 5+ years of experience shipping production iOS and Android apps. I work with Flutter, Swift, and Kotlin to build digital products — from government services to consumer apps — with over 15 apps live on the App Store and Google Play.
introduction.uz: 5+ yillik tajribaga ega Senior Mobile Engineer — iOS va Android uchun production darajadagi ilovalar yarataman. Flutter, Swift va Kotlin bilan davlat xizmatlaridan iste'molchi mahsulotlarigacha ishlayman. App Store va Google Play'da 15+ ilovam mavjud.
introduction.ru: Senior Mobile Engineer с опытом 5+ лет — создаю production-приложения для iOS и Android. Работаю с Flutter, Swift и Kotlin над цифровыми продуктами — от государственных сервисов до потребительских приложений. Более 15 приложений в App Store и Google Play.

en: 🚀 Building with Flutter since 2020 — 15+ apps shipped to production
🏛️ Currently at Unicon Soft, crafting digital products used across Uzbekistan
📱 Cross-platform specialist: Flutter, native iOS (Swift), and Android (Kotlin)
🧠 Focused on clean architecture, performance, and great developer experience
💬 Open to collaboration and always happy to talk shop — reach out anywhere
uz: 🚀 2020-yildan beri Flutter bilan ishlayman — 15+ ilova productionda
🏛️ Hozirda Unicon Soft'da O'zbekiston bo'ylab foydalanilayotgan mahsulotlar ustida ishlayman
📱 Cross-platform mutaxassisi: Flutter, native iOS (Swift) va Android (Kotlin)
🧠 Toza arxitektura, ish unumdorligi va developer experience'ga e'tibor qarataman
💬 Hamkorlikka ochiqman, savol-javoblardan zerikmaymiz — istalgan joyda yozing
ru: 🚀 С Flutter работаю с 2020 года — 15+ приложений в production
🏛️ Сейчас в Unicon Soft создаю продукты, которыми пользуются по всему Узбекистану
📱 Cross-platform эксперт: Flutter, native iOS (Swift) и Android (Kotlin)
🧠 Уделяю внимание чистой архитектуре, производительности и developer experience
💬 Открыт к сотрудничеству и техническим разговорам — пишите в любом мессенджере

description.en: End-to-end iOS and Android apps with Flutter — from concept to App Store and Google Play release.
description.uz: Flutter bilan iOS va Android uchun to'liq ilovalar — g'oyadan App Store va Google Play'gacha.
description.ru: iOS и Android приложения на Flutter под ключ — от идеи до релиза в App Store и Google Play.

description.en: Clean architecture, scalable state management, and code reviews that keep your app maintainable as it grows.
description.uz: Toza arxitektura, kengayadigan state management va kodingizni o'sib borgan sayin barqaror tutib turuvchi tahlillar.
description.ru: Чистая архитектура, масштабируемый state management и код-ревью, чтобы приложение оставалось поддерживаемым при росте.

description.en: Profiling, optimization, and testing to make sure apps stay fast, stable, and pleasant on every device.
description.uz: Profiling, optimallashtirish va testlash — ilova har qanday qurilmada tez, barqaror va yoqimli ishlashi uchun.
description.ru: Профилирование, оптимизация и тестирование — чтобы приложение работало быстро, стабильно и приятно на любом устройстве.
